answers: A citation is a reference to a source used in your writing. It gives credit to original authors and allows readers to find the source. Common formats include APA, MLA, Chicago, and IEEE.
Citation holo tomar source er reference dewa. APA 7th edition social science e use hoy, MLA humanities e, ar IEEE engineering e. Proper citation plagiarism avoid kore.
In-text citations go within your text (e.g., Smith, 2023) while the full reference goes in the bibliography. Tools like Zotero, Mendeley, and EndNote help manage citations automatically.

Citations are crucial in academic writing — they give credit to original authors, support your arguments with evidence, and allow readers to verify your sources. Always cite when you quote, paraphrase, or use someone's ideas.
